name: com.dvxr.vr-realtime
description: Drop-in world-space VR HUD that shows a person's personalized DVXR stats (decoded BCI command, stress, glucose-or-honest-abstention) in realtime beside their existing Unity avatar. Consumes the rt-demo-v1 stream contract. EXPERIMENTAL / demonstration only — not for clinical use.

samples.description: One-component setup that spawns the HUD against Camera.main / your XR Rig.
